When generating Git commit messages:

- Follow Conventional Commits.
- Use imperative mood.
- The commit message should be very concise and simple.
- Keep the subject under 30 characters.
- Do not end the subject with a period.
- Prefer these scopes: api, db, infra, agent, test, ci.
- Explain non-obvious changes in the body.
- Never use vague subjects such as "update code" or "fix stuff".
